description: Indicative datacenter locations and regional parameters for each US ISO/RTO. Lat/lon used for weather (Open-Meteo) and solar (PVWatts V8) API calls. Gas prices from EIA 2024 industrial natural-gas prices by state. CAPEX multipliers relative to ERCOT Texas baseline (NREL ATB 2025 regional cost factors).

ERCOT.name: Electric Reliability Council of Texas
ERCOT.notes: Henry Hub adjacent; lowest gas prices in CONUS. No capacity market — energy-only.

PJM.name: PJM Interconnection
PJM.notes: Largest ISO by load. Capacity market (RPM). Appalachian basin gas relatively cheap.

MISO.name: Midcontinent Independent System Operator
MISO.notes: Central MISO footprint. High wind penetration. Chicago citygate gas basis.

CAISO.name: California Independent System Operator
CAISO.notes: Central Valley — best solar in CAISO footprint. SoCal Gas basis. High labor/permitting cost. Duck curve severe.

SPP.name: Southwest Power Pool
SPP.notes: High wind and solar resource. ONEOK/Colorado Interstate gas pricing. Low-cost region.

NYISO.name: New York Independent System Operator
NYISO.notes: Upstate NY avoids NYC land premiums. Transco Z6 gas basis — expensive. High interconnection cost.

ISONE.name: ISO New England
ISONE.notes: Most expensive gas in CONUS (Algonquin citygate). Lowest solar CF. High construction costs.
